name: Diawi
description: Diawi — iOS and Android app distribution tool for sharing .ipa and .apk files with testers via direct link or QR code.

seo.title: Diawi — Release / App Store Operations
seo.meta_description: Diawi: Diawi — iOS and Android app distribution tool for sharing .ipa and .apk files with testers via direct link or QR code.

when_to_use: Sharing .ipa and .apk builds with testers via QR code or direct link
Quick iOS ad hoc distribution for client demos without MDM
Fast internal build distribution for small teams testing before store release
No-account-required .apk sharing for Android beta testing

pros: Dead simple drag-drop upload for .ipa and .apk
Direct links and QR codes for testers
No accounts required for basic sharing
Free tier covers casual beta sharing
cons: Minimal feedback or crash capture features
No proper beta management or versioning
iOS UDID provisioning still required upstream
Not suited for teams with compliance needs
review.verdict: Great for quick one-off build shares; teams doing real beta programs should move to TestFlight or Firebase.
review.best_for: Freelancers and devs sharing ad-hoc builds with a few testers
review.not_for: Teams running structured beta programs with feedback loops

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with no evidence of peak-lock
